_readme: Source of truth for the 'Parents born in' view. Edit this file, then run `py build/build_parents.py` to inject it into index.html and tennis-ranking-world-map.html. country = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3. status = verified (confirmed from a source) | inferred (best guess) | unknown. Add a source URL for verified entries; non-English sources are expected.

players.name: Jannik Sinner
players.note: German-speaking South Tyrol family from Sesto/Sexten; Italian citizens.

players.name: Carlos Alcaraz
players.note: Father from El Palmar (Murcia); mother of Sevillian origin.

players.name: Alexander Zverev
players.note: Both parents from Sochi, Russia; family emigrated to Germany.

players.name: Felix Auger Aliassime
players.note: Father emigrated from Togo to Quebec at 26; mother French-Canadian.

players.name: Ben Shelton
players.note: Father Bryan Shelton, former ATP pro and coach.

players.name: Alex De Minaur
players.note: Father Uruguayan; mother from Alicante, Spain. Born in Sydney.

players.name: Novak Djokovic
players.note: Only ethnic origin documented: father Serb (Kosovo-Montenegrin origin), mother Croatian. Exact birthplaces not published.

players.name: Daniil Medvedev
players.note: Russian family, born in Moscow. Parent birthplaces not individually published.

players.name: Taylor Fritz
players.note: Mother Kathy May, former WTA top-10 player.

players.name: Flavio Cobolli
players.note: Father Stefano Cobolli, former tennis player and his coach.

players.name: Alexander Bublik
players.note: Russian family (born Gatchina); represents Kazakhstan since 2016.

players.name: Andrey Rublev
players.note: Russian family, Moscow; mother Marina Marenko a tennis coach.

players.name: Casper Ruud
players.note: Father Christian Ruud, former ATP top-40 player.

players.name: Karen Khachanov
players.note: Armenian father (paternal family moved Yerevan→Moscow in USSR era), Russian mother. Father's exact birthplace not published.

players.name: Luciano Darderi
players.note: Both parents Argentine; Italian citizenship comes from paternal grandfather (Fano, Marche).

players.name: Learner Tien
players.note: Both parents Hoa (ethnic-Chinese Vietnamese) refugees who fled South Vietnam to the US.

players.name: Valentin Vacherot
players.note: Mother is a Paquet (French tennis family), sister of Rinderknech's mother. Born in Monaco.

players.name: Arthur Fils
players.note: Haitian father, French mother. (French sources correct the common 'Guadeloupe' claim to Haiti.)

players.name: Alejandro Davidovich Fokina
players.note: Swedish-Russian father, Russian mother; born near Málaga. Father's birthplace not published.

players.name: Arthur Rinderknech
players.note: Mother Virginie Paquet, French tennis player; cousin of Valentin Vacherot (their mothers are sisters).

players.name: Frances Tiafoe
players.note: Both parents emigrated from Sierra Leone, fleeing the civil war.

players.name: Tommy Paul
players.note: American family; raised in New Jersey and North Carolina.

players.name: Cameron Norrie
players.note: Scottish father, Welsh mother; born in Johannesburg, raised in New Zealand.

players.name: Alejandro Tabilo
players.note: Both parents Chilean; met in Toronto, where Alejandro was born.

players.name: Brandon Nakashima
players.note: Father Japanese-American (born California); mother born in Vietnam, moved to the US aged 5.

players.name: Denis Shapovalov
players.note: Mother from Lviv (Ukraine), a Soviet tennis finalist; Russian-Jewish family. Born Tel Aviv, moved to Canada as a baby.

players.name: Marin Cilic
players.note: Bosnian-Croat family from Međugorje, Herzegovina; represents Croatia.

players.name: Terence Atmane
players.note: French family from Boulogne-sur-Mer (paternal surname is North African).

players.name: Gabriel Diallo
players.note: Guinean father, Ukrainian mother; met in Russia, emigrated to Montreal.

players.name: Sebastian Korda
players.note: Both parents Czech former pros (father a Grand Slam champion).

players.name: Roman Andres Burruchaga
players.note: Argentine family (son of footballer Jorge Burruchaga).

players.name: Aleksandar Kovacevic
players.note: Serbian father, Bosnian mother (table-tennis players); emigrated to New York.

players.name: Stefanos Tsitsipas
players.note: Greek father, Russian mother (former Soviet player, daughter of footballer Sergei Salnikov).

players.name: Emilio Nava
players.note: Both parents Mexican Olympians (father a sprinter, mother a WTA player).

players.name: Alexei Popyrin
players.note: Russian family; born Sydney, represents Australia.

players.name: Giovanni Mpetshi Perricard
players.note: Congolese-born father (footballer), French mother; born in Lyon.

players.name: Aleksandar Vukic
players.note: Montenegrin father, Serbian mother; fled Sarajevo to Australia.

players.name: Elena Rybakina
players.note: Russian family (born Moscow); represents Kazakhstan since 2018.

players.name: Iga Swiatek
players.note: Father Tomasz, an Olympic rower for Poland.

players.name: Jessica Pegula
players.note: Mother Kim born in Seoul, adopted to the US as a child; father American.

players.name: Amanda Anisimova
players.note: Both parents from Moscow; emigrated to the US in 1998.

players.name: Jasmine Paolini
players.note: Mother born in Łódź, Poland (her father — Jasmine's grandfather — was Ghanaian).

players.name: Victoria Mboko
players.note: Both parents fled the DR Congo; Victoria born in Charlotte, raised in Canada.

players.name: Belinda Bencic
players.note: Slovak family born in Czechoslovakia; father's family emigrated to Switzerland in 1968.

players.name: Marta Kostyuk
players.note: Ukrainian family, Kyiv; mother a tennis coach.

players.name: Naomi Osaka
players.note: Haitian father, Japanese mother; born in Osaka, Japan.

players.name: Iva Jovic
players.note: Father from Leskovac (Serbia), mother born in Split (Croatia); family emigrated to California.

players.name: Leylah Fernandez
players.note: Father born in Guayaquil, Ecuador; mother born in Canada to Filipino parents.

players.name: Hailey Baptiste
players.note: Haitian-American family; parents' exact birthplaces not published (heritage-based).

players.name: Ann Li
players.note: Both parents Chinese immigrants (college athletes) from Changchun and Suzhou.

players.name: Emma Raducanu
players.note: Romanian father, Chinese mother; born in Toronto, raised in England.

players.name: Cristina Bucsa
players.note: Moldovan family; born in Chișinău, represents Spain.

players.name: Maya Joint
players.note: Australian father, German mother; born in Michigan, now represents Australia.

players.name: Alexandra Eala
players.note: Filipino family; mother a former national swimmer.

players.name: Lois Boisson
players.note: French family; father a former basketball player.

players.name: Maria Sakkari
players.note: Greek family; mother a former WTA player, grandfather a footballer.

players.name: Tereza Valentova
players.note: Czech family; mother a former canoeist.

players.name: Sonay Kartal
players.note: Father of Turkish heritage (relatives in Istanbul), English mother; born in London.

players.name: Daria Kasatkina
players.note: Russian family; switched to Australia in 2024.

players.name: Sofia Kenin
players.note: Russian family; born in Moscow, emigrated to the US as a baby.

players.name: Eva Lys
players.note: Ukrainian family (father a former Ukraine Davis Cup player); born Kyiv, moved to Germany aged two.

players.name: Ajla Tomljanovic
players.note: Croatian family (father a former handball/water-polo player); born Zagreb, represents Australia.

players.name: Viktorija Golubic
players.note: Swiss family of former-Yugoslav (Serbian) origin, Zürich.
